class Solution:
    def grayCode(self, n: int) -> list[int]:
        # A Gray code sequence can be generated by the formula:
        # Gray(i) = i ^ (i >> 1)
        # This converts the binary index i into its corresponding Gray code.
        
        # 1 << n is equivalent to 2^n
        return [i ^ (i >> 1) for i in range(1 << n)]
